name: Encore Medical, Inc.
business: We develop, manufacture, and market septal occlusion devices for the repair of certain cardiac defects. Our primary closure device is designed to correct a cardiac defect known as a patent foramen ovale (PFO). We currently sell and market septal occlusion devices for the closure of cardiac defects in countries outside of the United States.
sellsTo: Hospitals and cardiac catheterization labs via independent distributors and limited direct sales personnel
Primarily in Italy, Germany, Czech Republic, and other countries outside the US

exposures.sentence: We develop, manufacture, and market septal occlusion devices for the repair of certain cardiac defects.

GB Sciences granted us an exclusive, perpetual, sublicenseable, worldwide, fully paid-up license to their AI platform and technologies that includes certain intellectual property, technology, patents, patent applications, know-how, trade secrets, trademarks, data, regulatory materials and related proprietary rights identified in the License Agreement.

catalysts.event: CE Mark renewal expected prior to December 31, 2027
catalysts.sentence: We have begun the process of renewing our CE Mark and expect to receive such renewal prior to December 31, 2027.
If those conditions are not satisfied by September 31, 2026, the outside date specified in the License Agreement, either party may terminate the agreement.
That indebtedness is secured by all of the Company's assets and matures on November 5, 2026.

We have also incurred unsecured indebtedness for borrowed money, evidenced by three promissory notes of like tenor, in the aggregate amount of $350,000, that, unless extended or converted at the option of the holder prior to repayment, mature on June 30, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 250,000 cases per year worldwide require immediate closure of PFO due to cryptogenic stroke.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that approximately 250,000 cases per year worldwide require immediate closure of PFO due to cryptogenic stroke.

tamClaims.claim: Total potential worldwide market for ASD products is approximately 50,000 cases per year.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the total potential worldwide market for our ASD products to be approximately 50,000 cases per year.

tamClaims.claim: Assuming average retail price of $11,000 per device, migraine market represents a multi-billion-dollar opportunity.
tamClaims.sentence: Assuming current average retail prices of approximately $11,000 per device, we believe the market represents a multi-billion-dollar opportunity.
